chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-490 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 06.8.2025 Mr.Muhammad Imran Choudhry, Advocate for the Petitioner ********** Through the instant petition, the Petitioner seeks directions to the Respondents for demarcation of his land bearing Survey No.182 admeasuring 7-35 Acres situated in Deh Saindad Shoro, Tapa Atna Taluka Sindhri, District Mirpurkhas. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner has moved application for demarcation of his land to the Respondents No.3 and 4, but same has not been decided and is pending. However, he states that the Petitioner shall be satisfied if appropriate directions are issued to the Respondents No.3 and 4, for disposal of the application. Learned A.A.G, present in Court in other matters and waived notice of instant petition and does not oppose such request and assures that the application of the Petitioner shall be decided strictly in accordance with law. In view of the foregoing, the instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the Respondent No.3 and 4, to decide the Petitioner’s pending application after providing opportunity of hearing to all concerned in accordance with law within two weeks from the date of receipt of this order. Office is directed to communicate a copy of this order to the learned A.A.G. for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
